name: Salt Edge
description: Open banking platform connecting 5,000+ banks across 50+ countries via a single API.

seo.title: Salt Edge — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Salt Edge: Open banking platform connecting 5,000+ banks across 50+ countries via a single API.

when_to_use: Open banking API connecting 5,000+ banks across 50+ countries
PSD2 AIS and PIS compliance for European fintech apps
Bank account aggregation for personal finance and accounting apps
Bank-grade data access with consent management for fintechs
Global open finance integration with one provider

pros: PSD2 and open banking compliance handled
AISP/PISP licensing available as managed service
Flexible: white-label, API, or compliance-only options
cons: Connection reliability varies by smaller regional banks
Documentation can feel fragmented across products
Support response times uneven for smaller clients
review.verdict: Broadest bank coverage in open banking, especially outside the UK, though connection quality is uneven on long-tail banks.
review.best_for: Fintechs and lenders needing wide European and emerging-market bank coverage
review.not_for: Teams needing only US banks or top-tier connection SLAs on obscure institutions

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
